description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a large, overhanging terracotta-tiled hip roof. The front facade features a combination of dark and light exterior walls, with expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and a prominent balcony on the upper level. The balcony is enclosed with sleek metal railings, and vertical structural elements add a contemporary touch to the design. The side and rear facades are more subdued, with light-colored brickwork and minimal window openings. The house appears to be constructed primarily from brick, concrete, and glass, with metal accents for railings and supports. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a large terracotta-tiled hip roof, expansive windows, and a prominent balcony with metal railings. The facade combines dark and light brickwork for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, a balcony with metal railings, and a mix of dark and light wall finishes.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by light brickwork and minimal window openings, with the hip roof extending over the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with a uniform light brick exterior and no visible windows or architectural features.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the balcony, vertical structural elements, and the overhanging roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a recessed door beneath the balcony, with a covered porch area and modern metal railings.
